mapper.select: select message_id, conversation_id, user_id, role, content, answer_type, response_type, status, elapsed_ms, sort_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from fe_ai_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_no asc, message_id asc
mapper.update: update fe_ai_message set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
